# Exclimo | Private Luxury Chauffeur Service (DMV)

> Exclimo, LLC is a private luxury chauffeur company serving the DMV region:
> Washington DC, Maryland and Northern Virginia. It offers chauffeured,
> flight-tracked rides with fixed personal quotes that compete with premium
> rideshare tiers, with no surge pricing. Available 24/7, every day.

## Services
- Airport transfers at every airport in the region, including Dulles (IAD), Reagan National (DCA), BWI and private/regional airfields, with real-time flight tracking
- Corporate and executive travel
- Weddings and special events
- Point-to-point private rides across the DMV
- Early-morning and late-night rides (24/7 operation)
- Government and diplomatic transportation

## How booking works
Exclimo uses a request-and-quote model, not instant booking. Customers submit
trip details (pickup date/time, locations, an optional map link to the exact
pickup spot, passengers, bags, optional airline and flight number) via the
website form, email, or phone. Exclimo staff reviews
the request and replies with a personal, all-inclusive quote, typically within
the hour. Nothing is charged until the trip is confirmed.

## Contact
- Company: Exclimo, LLC
- Address: 1578 Cameron Crescent Dr Ste 12, Reston, VA 20190
- Phone: 571-678-9209
- Email: exclimo1@gmail.com
- Hours: 24/7
- Area served: Washington DC, Maryland, Virginia (DMV region)

## Key facts
- Private, owner-operated company (not a rideshare platform)
- Licensed and commercially insured; background-checked chauffeurs
- Fixed quotes that never surge
- Child seats available on request
- Recommended lead time: 24 hours (same-day often possible by phone)
